---
title: 'Waqas Ahmed (Combatant Soldier)'
date: '2015-12-02T05:10:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '509645043100773086'
blogger_filename: '/2015/12/waqas-ahmed-combatant-soldier_1.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Character Sketch'
---

<br /><br /><br /><br />Born an orphan, raised in an ISIS villiage. He was trained for one thing, to bring the sword of Allah to the infidels.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: .5in; margin-right: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-indent: -.25in;"><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: .5in; margin-right: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-indent: -.25in;"><br /><div style="margin: 0px;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;symbol&quot;;">·<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 7pt; font-stretch: normal;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/">Hints</a>)(<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Now,_Discover_Your_Strengths" target="_blank">Strengths List</a>)(<a href="https://www.isa.org/templates/two-column.aspx?pageid=134103&amp;append=35734" target="_blank">Strengths details</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/personality-types" target="_blank">16P-Types</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/articles/our-theory" target="_blank">16P-Theory</a>)<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /></div><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Hello my name is Amy Truthfinder, and I’m here with xxxxxxxx from<br />the xxxxxxx series, to find out more about him/her and get a little behind the<br />scenes information. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">In the way of introductions:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Xxxxxxx is a Primary/Supporting character in the book xxxxx. He<br />has chosen to side with the (Good/Bad/ Neither, he remains neutral, is unware<br />of the sides). <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Xxxxxx was born on xx/xx/xx, which makes him xxxx years old as of<br />xx/xx/xx. <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">He/She has the following distinct physical characteristics;<br />xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx.<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Personality and Motivations:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me, what is your 16P Type, what are you top five Strengths<br />finders results, and what one-three words best describes you?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What do you do with <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">time when you are not working?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What are the things you enjoy most in life? <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What things just bug you to no end?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If every job, task, and activity in the world paid the same (and<br />it was more than enough to have everything you wanted) what would you do?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If you could sit down and chat with person who is alive today, who<br />would it be? What about anyone not alive today? What about a non-real person?<br />What about someone from your story world?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Training and background<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me about your schooling. What high school did you go to?<br />Where did you go to college? What activities did you participate in? Sororities<br />/ Fraternities? Were you&nbsp; in any other groups? Did you work through<br />school, loans, scholarships, rich family?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me about your major. How many degrees do you have? In what?<br />Why that and not something else?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your first job? How many jobs have you had? What was your<br />favorite job? Least favorite job? What do you do now? <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Do you hold any licenses, specialties, etc.? <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If you could switch jobs today what would you do? (Real and<br />Imagined)<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Family history<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What are your parents name? Do you know your grandparents? Do you<br />have an siblings? Cousins, Aunts, Uncles, Other important relatives? Are you<br />related to anyone famous? <o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What does your name mean, and why did you parents choose it?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Is there anything interesting or important or unusual we need to<br />know about your family?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your relationship like with your Mother? Father? Others?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">How is your relationship now?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Early Childhood through middle school<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What experiences, growing up, marked your memory? In other words,<br />what can you remember about your childhood, what stands out?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Who were your best friends?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Worst enemies, bullies?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your best day? Worst?<o:p></o:p></span></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Here are some photos that remind me of you:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><br /><br /></div><br /><div class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent: .5in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br /><div style="font-weight: normal;"><br /><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" data-gapiattached="true" data-gapiscan="true" data-onload="true" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,&nbsp;</b></div><br /></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><br /></blockquote><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><br />By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><br /><br /><br /><i>* I may include "Affiliate Links" which means I earn a commission when you buy some of the products I link to.&nbsp;</i><br /><br /><br /><br /><ul><br /><li><i>See my full about page and disclosures:&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>.&nbsp;</i></li><br /></ul><br /><ul><br /><li><i>Also check out my&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">Resources and Suggestions&nbsp;</a>for writers (<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;</i></li><br /></ul><br /><br /><br /><i></i><br /><br /><br /><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br /><br /><br />To Subscribe to the&nbsp;<a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br />For Non-Fiction stories with a lesson by&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: right;"><br /><br /></div><br />
